homepage.heroSubline: Reliable heating and cooling solutions for Bay Area homes. Expert HVAC service and installation, guaranteed.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted San Jose HVAC Experts
aboutText: HVAC Gurus started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable HVAC services to our neighbors in San Jose. We've grown from a small team to a trusted name, thanks to our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our approach is simple: assess the needs, provide clear options, and execute with precision. We use quality parts and employ the best technicians to ensure lasting results.
We're proud to be a part of the San Jose community. From sponsoring local events to supporting local charities, we believe in giving back to the place we call home.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: HVAC emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. Get immediate assistance when you need it most.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team of certified technicians has the expertise to handle any HVAC challenge.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule your no-obligation consultation and experience the HVAC Gurus difference.

services.name: AC Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable AC repair services to keep you cool in the San Jose heat.
services.description:
Is your AC unit struggling to keep up with the San Jose heat? Don't sweat it! HVAC Gurus offers comprehensive AC repair services to get your system back up and running quickly and efficiently. We understand the discomfort of a malfunctioning AC, especially during the peak summer months in the Bay Area.

Our experienced technicians are equipped to diagnose and repair all makes and models of air conditioners. From refrigerant leaks and compressor issues to faulty wiring and thermostat problems, we've seen it all. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the problem accurately and provide lasting solutions.

We prioritize prompt service and transparent communication. We'll explain the issue in detail, provide a clear estimate of the repair costs, and answer any questions you may have before proceeding with the work. Our goal is to restore your AC's performance and ensure your comfort with minimal disruption to your day.

Don't let a broken AC disrupt your life. Contact HVAC Gurus for reliable AC repair services you can trust.
process: Step 1: Schedule a convenient appointment.
Step 2: Our technician will diagnose the AC issue.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed estimate and explanation.
Step 4: We'll complete the repair efficiently and effectively.
benefits: Peace of mind knowing your AC is in good hands

faq.question: How quickly can you repair my AC?
faq.answer: We offer same-day and next-day appointments whenever possible. Our technicians will arrive promptly and work efficiently to resolve your AC issue.

faq.question: Do you repair all AC brands?
faq.answer: Yes, we have experience repairing all major AC brands and models. Our technicians are continuously trained on the latest technologies and repair techniques.

faq.question: What are the signs that my AC needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include weak airflow, strange noises, unusual odors, frequent cycling, and increased energy bills.

services.name: AC Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert AC installation for optimal cooling performance in your San Jose home.
services.description:
Upgrade your home's cooling system with HVAC Gurus' professional AC installation services. Whether you're replacing an old, inefficient unit or installing AC in a new construction, we have the expertise to ensure a seamless and efficient installation process.

We offer a wide selection of high-quality AC units from leading brands to suit your specific needs and budget. Our team will assess your home's size, insulation, and cooling requirements to recommend the right AC system for optimal performance and energy efficiency. Considering San Jose's mild climate but also the occasional heat spikes, an efficient system is key.

Our certified technicians will handle every aspect of the installation process, from removing the old unit to properly connecting the new one. We pay close attention to detail to ensure proper airflow, refrigerant levels, and electrical connections. We also provide thorough testing and calibration to guarantee optimal performance.

Invest in a comfortable and energy-efficient home. Contact HVAC Gurus for expert AC installation services and experience the difference.
process: Step 1: Schedule a free consultation.
Step 2: We'll assess your cooling needs and recommend the right AC system.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed installation estimate.
Step 4: Our technicians will install your new AC unit with precision and care.

faq.question: How long does AC installation take?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the complexity of the project, but most installations can be completed within a day. We'll provide a more accurate estimate during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make AC installation more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

faq.question: What type of AC unit is best for my home?
faq.answer: The best AC unit depends on your home's size, insulation, and cooling requirements. We'll help you choose the right unit during the consultation.

services.name: Furnace Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable furnace repair services to keep your home warm during San Jose's cooler months.
services.description:
Don't let a malfunctioning furnace leave you shivering during the cooler months in San Jose. HVAC Gurus offers prompt and reliable furnace repair services to restore your home's heating system to optimal performance.

Our experienced technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all types of furnaces, including gas, electric, and propane models. From ignition problems and blower motor failures to heat exchanger issues and thermostat malfunctions, we have the expertise to handle any furnace repair.

We understand the importance of a functioning furnace, especially during the occasional cold snaps in the Bay Area. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency furnace repair services to ensure your comfort and safety. We prioritize quick response times and efficient repairs to minimize disruption to your day.

We are committed to providing transparent and honest service. We'll explain the issue in detail, provide a clear estimate of the repair costs, and answer any questions you may have before proceeding with the work. Our goal is to restore your furnace's performance and ensure your comfort with minimal hassle.

Contact HVAC Gurus for dependable furnace repair services you can count on.
process: Step 1: Contact us for immediate assistance.
Step 2: Our technician will diagnose the furnace issue.
Step 3: We'll provide a cost estimate for the repair.
Step 4: We'll complete the repair quickly and efficiently.
benefits: Peace of mind during the cooler months

faq.question: How often should I have my furnace serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend scheduling annual furnace maintenance to ensure optimal performance and prevent potential problems.

faq.question: What are the signs that my furnace needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include strange noises, unusual odors, weak airflow, and inconsistent heating.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency furnace repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency furnace repair services to address urgent heating issues.

services.name: Duct Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Improve your indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning services in San Jose.
services.description:
Improve the air you breathe with HVAC Gurus' professional duct cleaning services. Over time, dust, pollen, allergens, and other contaminants can accumulate in your air ducts, impacting your indoor air quality and potentially causing health issues.

Our experienced technicians use specialized equipment to thoroughly clean your air ducts, removing built-up debris and restoring optimal airflow. We follow industry best practices to ensure a safe and effective cleaning process without causing damage to your ductwork. Considering the dust and allergens common in San Jose, clean ducts are important.

Duct cleaning can improve your home's energy efficiency by allowing your HVAC system to operate more effectively. It can also reduce allergy symptoms, eliminate musty odors, and create a healthier living environment for you and your family.

Breathe easier with clean air ducts. Contact HVAC Gurus for professional duct cleaning services you can trust.
process: Step 1: Schedule a duct cleaning appointment.
Step 2: Our technician will inspect your ductwork.
Step 3: We'll use specialized equipment to clean your ducts.
Step 4: We'll ensure proper airflow and air quality.

faq.question: How often should I have my ducts cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your ducts cleaned every 3-5 years, or more frequently if you have pets, allergies, or respiratory issues.

faq.question: How long does duct cleaning take?
faq.answer: The duct cleaning process typically takes 2-4 hours, depending on the size and complexity of your ductwork.

faq.question: Is duct cleaning messy?
faq.answer: No, our technicians use specialized equipment to contain the dust and debris during the cleaning process. We'll leave your home clean and tidy.

services.name: HVAC Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Preventative HVAC maintenance to keep your system running smoothly in San Jose.
services.description:
Protect your investment and ensure optimal performance with HVAC Gurus' comprehensive HVAC maintenance services. Regular maintenance can prevent costly repairs, extend the lifespan of your equipment, and improve energy efficiency. With San Jose's varied weather, keeping your system in top shape is crucial.

Our experienced technicians will thoroughly inspect your HVAC system, clean vital components, lubricate moving parts, and identify potential problems before they escalate. We'll also check refrigerant levels, test electrical connections, and calibrate your thermostat to ensure optimal performance.

HVAC maintenance can save you money on energy bills by ensuring your system operates efficiently. It can also improve your indoor air quality by preventing the buildup of dust, pollen, and other allergens. Most importantly, it provides peace of mind knowing your HVAC system is in good working order.

Invest in preventative maintenance and avoid costly breakdowns. Contact HVAC Gurus for reliable HVAC maintenance services you can count on.
process: Step 1: Schedule a maintenance appointment.
Step 2: Our technician will inspect your HVAC system.
Step 3: We'll perform necessary cleaning and adjustments.
Step 4: We'll provide a detailed maintenance report.

faq.question: How often should I schedule HVAC maintenance?
faq.answer: We recommend scheduling HVAC maintenance at least once a year, preferably in the spring for AC and fall for heating.

faq.question: What is included in HVAC maintenance?
faq.answer: HVAC maintenance includes a thorough inspection, cleaning, lubrication, and calibration of your system's components.

faq.question: Will HVAC maintenance void my warranty?
faq.answer: No, regular HVAC maintenance will not void your warranty. In fact, many manufacturers require regular maintenance to maintain warranty coverage.

services.name: Air Quality Testing
services.shortDescription: Ensure healthy indoor air with our professional air quality testing services in San Jose.
services.description:
Are you concerned about the air quality in your San Jose home? HVAC Gurus offers professional air quality testing services to identify potential pollutants and ensure a healthy living environment. Given the density of San Jose, air quality can be a concern for many homeowners.

Our certified technicians use advanced equipment to test for a variety of airborne contaminants, including mold spores, dust mites, pollen, volatile organic compounds (VOCs), and carbon monoxide. We'll provide a detailed report of our findings and recommend solutions to improve your indoor air quality.

Poor air quality can trigger allergy symptoms, respiratory problems, and other health issues. Air quality testing can help you identify and address potential problems before they impact your health and well-being.

Breathe easier with clean, healthy air. Contact HVAC Gurus for professional air quality testing services you can trust.
process: Step 1: Schedule an air quality testing appointment.
Step 2: Our technician will conduct air quality tests.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed report of our findings.
Step 4: We'll recommend solutions to improve your air quality.

faq.question: What are the signs of poor air quality?
faq.answer: Common signs include allergy symptoms, respiratory problems, headaches, fatigue, and musty odors.

faq.question: How long does air quality testing take?
faq.answer: Air quality testing typically takes 1-2 hours, depending on the size of your home.

faq.question: What can I do to improve my air quality?
faq.answer: Solutions include air purifiers, duct cleaning, proper ventilation, and addressing moisture problems.

serviceAreas.content:
HVAC Gurus is proud to offer comprehensive heating, ventilation, and air conditioning services to the residents and businesses of San Jose, California. From the heart of Silicon Valley to the diverse neighborhoods throughout the city, we are committed to ensuring your indoor comfort year-round.

Our team of certified technicians provides expert installation, repair, and maintenance for all types of HVAC systems. Whether you need a new furnace installed, AC repair, or routine system maintenance, HVAC Gurus is here to keep your home or business comfortable and energy-efficient.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Our AC went out during a heatwave, and HVAC Gurus responded quickly. The technician, David, was professional and diagnosed the problem right away. The repair was fast and affordable. We're so grateful for their prompt service!

reviews.name: John K.
reviews.text: HVAC Gurus installed a new furnace in our Willow Glen home. The installation crew was efficient and cleaned up everything afterward. The new furnace works great, and our house is much warmer now. The price was competitive and the service was professional.

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: I had my ducts cleaned by HVAC Gurus, and I'm amazed at the difference. The air in my house feels cleaner, and my allergy symptoms have improved. The technicians were thorough and explained the process clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: We've been using HVAC Gurus for annual maintenance for years. They're always reliable and professional. Their preventative maintenance has saved us from costly repairs down the road. Great service!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: HVAC Gurus installed a new AC unit in our Rose Garden home. The sales process was smooth, and the installation was done on time. The new AC works perfectly, and it's much more energy-efficient than our old unit.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: I was concerned about mold in my home, so I hired HVAC Gurus for air quality testing. They identified elevated mold levels and recommended a remediation plan. I appreciated their thoroughness and expertise.
